name: Shrimp & Scallop Kabobs
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Sea Scallops, Cut in Half
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and devein the shrimp.
2. Drain the pineapple chunks and reserve the liquid.
3. In a medium bowl, combine oil, pineapple juice, lemon juice, soy sauce, garlic, ginger, and onion powder; mix well.
4. Add shrimp and scallops to the bowl. Cover and refrigerate for 3 hours or overnight.
5. Place shrimp, scallops, pineapple, and zucchini on bamboo skewers that have soaked in water for 1 hour or on metal skewers.
6. Grill or broil the kabobs for 3 to 6 minutes per side or until the shrimp are pink, basting frequently with marinade.
